title: Schedule
description: Defines timing for a future or recurring event using RFC 3339 dates and ISO 8601 durations.

anchor_date.description: Reference point for the schedule as an RFC 3339 timestamp. Defaults to order time if omitted.

offset.description: ISO 8601 duration from `anchor_date` to the first occurrence.

occurrences.description: Number of occurrences. Omit for an indefinite recurring schedule.
